name: Crush 'Accidently' Sent Her Nudes 💗
description:
"Oops.. You better delete it. I don't want my boyfriend thinking I'm cheating with someone like YOU"

What would you do if your crush 'accidently' sent you a picture of her tits, saying it was supposedly 'wasn't meant for you

On one hand, free pics from the person you like the most! But on the other hand, she does have a boyfriend, and she may or may not have only sent it to you in order to catch you in the act of being a 'creep'

This is my first bot!!

On this account, I'm just gonna be posting random ass content, 'shit posts' if you must.

Don't complain about them being 'low effort' or 'dumb' in the reviews cuz thats litterally the point.

If the bot speaks for you or is acting up, refer to these links - https://rentry.co/jllmfordummies

https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts

Leaving a bad review because of something the bot said is like leaving a bad review at a restaurant because you just so happened to bite your tongue while eating, it's out of my control, its a robot! So any bad reviews about anything the bot said AFTER the first message will be deleted

Love you ❤️
